nasb.text: And he would answer and say to them, “The man who has two tunics is to share with him who has none; and he who has food is to do likewise.”

esv.text: And he answered them, “Whoever has two tunics is to share with him who has none, and whoever has food is to do likewise.”

cnv.text: 他回答：“有兩件衣服的，當分給那沒有的，有食物的也當照樣作。”

ccb.text: 约翰回答说：“有两件衣服的，应当分一件给没有的；食物充裕的，应当分些给饥饿的。”

csbs.text: 约翰回答说：“有两件衣服的，当分给那没有的；有食物的，也当如此做。”
